meaning: 累西腓[巴西东北部港市](即伯尔南布科
examples: The police prohibited us reporters entering Brazil at Recife.
USA and Germany face off on June 26 at Arena Pernambuco in Recife, Brazil.
Mr Neeleman and his wife recently returned to the church where he was a missionary in Recife.
Frevo is a Brazilian artistic expression comprising music and dance, performed mainly during the Carnival of Recife.
Of the state capitals, it is likely to retain Belo Horizonte and Recife, and may win Curitiba.
